items.title: 'Bit of pain' worth long-term security from Iran, Bessent tells BBC
items.summary: US Treasury Secretary said a "small bit of economic pain" was worth it to eliminate the threat of Iranian strikes on Western capitals.

items.title: Israel and Lebanon hold first direct talks since 1993
items.summary: A US statement said the two sides had agreed to launch direct negotiations, at a time and place to be determined.

items.title: Three years of messages at once - a chronicle of Sudan's war pours in as trapped reporter's phone turns on
items.summary: As the conflict enters its fourth year, journalist Mohamed Suleiman shudders at what has been lost.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普評匈牙利準總理馬格雅「會做得很好」 談前盟友奧班「是好人」
